<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" type="device"><diagram id="d1" name="テスト依存"><mxGraphModel dx="800" dy="270" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="270" math="0" shadow="0"><root><mxCell id="0"/><mxCell id="1" parent="0"/><mxCell id="AC" value="受け入れ基準 AC
